arts.ttl: Stoke City team news vs Norwich as Mark Robins makes three changes
arts.sum: Stoke: Johansson, Tchamadeu, Stevens, Rose, Phillips, Pearson, Seko, Baker, Moran, Junho, Al-Hamadi. In come Enda Stevens, Tatsuki Seko and Lewis Baker as Stoke look to build on that victory and edge themselves up the Championship table.

arts.ttl: MATCHDAY LIVE: Norwich City v Stoke City
arts.sum: Follow live updates and join the debate at Carrow Road as Norwich City face Hull in the Championship.

arts.ttl: Norwich City vs Stoke City live - Team news from Carrow Road - Stoke-on-Trent Live
arts.sum: Norwich are four points adrift of the top six after drawing two and losing one of their last three games. Mark Robins brings his squad east on the back of two wins in his last three league games as they try to shift clear of the danger zone and towards mid-table.

arts.ttl: Robin Sainty: The great Norwich City debate is starting to become more clear
arts.sum: Norwich City columnist Robin Sainty believes we have arrived at the stage of the season where the divergence of opinion between those whose glass is half full and those whose is half empty becomes particularly marked.

arts.ttl: Ben Pearson on his year out, yellow cards and what everyone says about Stoke
arts.sum: He felt good through the first 45 minutes of the Swansea game and admitted that he didn’t want half-time to come – and if he felt it a little bit after that, he is confident he will be able to build himself back up by playing more over the next three or four weeks. If it’s been a tough year for Pearson, he can appreciate he hasn’t been a particularly chirpy patient at times for Stoke’s medical team.

arts.ttl: Scintillating can wait as long as Stoke keep doing little things I've spotted
arts.sum: Phillips has to keep working on his body position too and making sure he can always see the opposition player to pick up. He’s seen if they can handle responsibility in and out of their comfort zones and he can be confident that levels will rise as one or two senior players come back to fitness, driving competition and standards.

arts.ttl: Norwich City boss makes 'difficult' Stoke City point as injuries bite
arts.sum: Canaries boss Johannes Hoff Thorup revealed that Chilean Nunez had been in training all week preparing to make his return, but he is still missing key players elsewhere. Norwich City midfielder Marcelino Nunez has shaken off an ankle problem to be fit to face Stoke City on Saturday (3pm), but Matej Jurasek will miss the game with a thigh problem.

arts.ttl: 'I think they’re a side full of quality' - Robins on Norwich City challenge
arts.sum: Mark Robins has praised Norwich City’s recruitment – but admits it’s Josh Sargent who is the dangerman for his Stoke team at Carrow Rod on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Mark Robins highlights 'moment of brilliance' that could have big impact on Stoke City future
arts.sum: The goal has been the talk of the Potteries this past week, and now the Stoke manager has had his say on an effort he claims would have received far more plaudits had it been scored in the Premier League. Lewis Baker was channelling his inner David Beckham when his 62-yard effort from inside his own half sailed into the Swansea City net to seal a 3-1 Stoke City victory - and hand Potters boss Mark Robins his first win at the bet365 Stadium.

arts.ttl: ‘Running out of time’ – Norwich City vs Stoke City prediction: The72
arts.sum: The72's writers offer their Norwich City vs Stoke City prediction ahead of the Championship clash on Saturday. The post ‘Running out of time’ – Norwich City vs Stoke City prediction: The72 appeared first on The72 - Football League News.
